email_body:
Beste,

Met veel enthousiasme reageer ik op de vacature voor Sales Support Administrator in Aartselaar. Uw omschrijving sluit naadloos aan bij mijn ervaring in klantgerichte functies en mijn technische achtergrond.

In mijn huidige rol als Junior Digital Marketer bij Episto ben ik verantwoordelijk voor order-to-cash processen in de digitale context: van orderverwerking tot facturatie en after-sales. Ik werk nauw samen met accountmanagers en interne afdelingen (logistiek, productie, marketing) om een vlotte doorloop te garanderen. Mijn ervaring met SAP-achtige systemen en CRM-tools stelt mij in staat om snel te schakelen tussen verschillende platforms.

Daarnaast spreek ik vloeiend Engels en Turks, en heb ik een B1-niveau Nederlands (met actieve taalcursus). Mijn kennis van Russisch is beperkt, maar ik leer snel. Ik ben accuraat, stressbestendig en een geboren probleemoplosser.

Ik kijk ernaar uit om mijn organisatorische vaardigheden en commerciële drive in te zetten voor uw team. Ik ben beschikbaar voor een gesprek.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the Sales Support Administrator position in Aartselaar. Your description closely matches my experience in customer-facing roles and my technical background.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I manage order-to-cash processes in a digital context: from order processing to invoicing and after-sales. I work closely with account managers and internal departments (logistics, production, marketing) to ensure smooth workflows. My experience with SAP-like systems and CRM tools allows me to quickly adapt to different platforms.

I am fluent in English and Turkish, and have B1 Dutch (with an active language course). My Russian is limited, but I am a fast learner. I am accurate, stress-resistant, and a born problem solver.

I look forward to bringing my organizational skills and commercial drive to your team. I am available for an interview.

Best regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Beste lezer,

Met veel enthousiasme reageer ik op de vacature voor Sales Support Administrator in Aartselaar. Uw omschrijving van de functie – met focus op order-to-cash, ondersteuning van accountmanagers en coördinatie met interne afdelingen – sluit naadloos aan bij mijn ervaring en vaardigheden.

In mijn huidige rol als Junior Digital Marketer bij Episto ben ik verantwoordelijk voor het volledige order-to-cash proces in een digitale omgeving: van orderverwerking en follow-up tot facturatie en after-sales. Ik werk dagelijks samen met accountmanagers om de commerciële strategie te implementeren, inclusief upselling en cross-selling. Daarnaast coördineer ik met de traffic- en productieafdeling om pieken en dalen in de supply chain te voorkomen. Mijn ervaring met CRM-systemen en data-analyse (Google Analytics, SEMrush) stelt mij in staat om klantinformatie accuraat in kaart te brengen en te rapporteren.

U vraagt om een resultaatgerichte teamplayer met een diplomatieke en assertieve communicatiestijl. In mijn projecten, zoals mirook.com, heb ik bewezen gestructureerd en nauwkeurig te werken, met oog voor detail en deadlines. Ik ben stressbestendig en los problemen graag zelfstandig op.

Wat talen betreft: ik spreek vloeiend Engels en Turks, en heb een B1-niveau Nederlands (met actieve taalcursus). Mijn kennis van Russisch is beperkt, maar ik leer snel en ben gemotiveerd om me verder te ontwikkelen.

Ik ben overtuigd dat ik met mijn organisatorische vaardigheden, commerciële drive en technische achtergrond een waardevolle bijdrage kan leveren aan uw team. Ik kijk uit naar een gesprek om mijn motivatie verder toe te lichten.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear reader,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the Sales Support Administrator position in Aartselaar. Your description of the role – focusing on order-to-cash, supporting account managers, and coordinating with internal departments – closely matches my experience and skills.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I am responsible for the full order-to-cash process in a digital environment: from order processing and follow-up to invoicing and after-sales. I work daily with account managers to implement the commercial strategy, including upselling and cross-selling. I also coordinate with the traffic and production departments to avoid peaks and lows in the supply chain. My experience with CRM systems and data analysis (Google Analytics, SEMrush) enables me to accurately map customer information and report.

You ask for a result-oriented team player with a diplomatic and assertive communication style. In my projects, such as mirook.com, I have proven to work structured and accurately, with attention to detail and deadlines. I am stress-resistant and enjoy solving problems independently.

Regarding languages: I am fluent in English and Turkish, and have B1 Dutch (with an active language course). My Russian is limited, but I am a fast learner and motivated to develop further.

I am convinced that with my organizational skills, commercial drive, and technical background, I can make a valuable contribution to your team. I look forward to a conversation to further explain my motivation.

Best regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
• Full order-to-cash process experience: order processing, invoicing, after-sales, and coordination with logistics/production
• Daily collaboration with account managers on commercial strategy (upselling, cross-selling) and CRM data management
• Strong internal coordination across departments (traffic, production, sales, marketing) to optimize supply chain
• Fluent English + B1 Dutch (active learning); quick to pick up new languages and tools
• Accurate, stress-resistant, problem-solving mindset with experience in SAP-like systems and data analysis
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

## Profile
Junior digital marketer with a technical foundation in web design, SEO, and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization). At Episto, I run on-page SEO, keyword-targeted content, and full-cycle WordPress site build and maintenance for client sites. On my own project (mirook.com) I've applied structured data, entity optimization, and technical SEO/GEO audits to improve visibility across both traditional and AI-powered search engines. Comfortable across content management, social media coordination, and performance reporting; quick to pick up new tools and platforms, and growing into analytics, e-commerce content management, and campaign support. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: B1, currently taking classes to improve further.

## Core skills
- Order-to-cash process: order processing, invoicing, after-sales, supply chain coordination
- CRM & data management: customer information mapping, reporting, upselling/cross-selling support
- Internal & external coordination: collaboration with logistics, production, sales, marketing, and distributors
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1), basic Russian
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO (AI search visibility)
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- Analytics & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Social: social media content & integration

## Experience

### Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

### Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

### Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

## Projects

### mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

## Education
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

## References
Available on request.
